name: Nadagamkarayo
overview: Sara and his rowdy gang joins the village's drama team despite their arrogant attitudes, and the rest of the villagers get annoyed when the headmaster starting to defend their unacceptable behavior.

trailers.title: Nadagamkarayo Introduction Programme II නාඩගම්කාරයෝ හඳුන්වාදීමේ වැඩසටහන
